functions.getPreviousCategoryId: Retrieves the ID of the previous category in a hierarchical category structure
functions.getExtensibleEnumOption: Fetches an option value from an extensible enum
functions.getEntity: Retrieves an entity object by its identifier

filters.isImage: Checks if the provided value represents an image, by validating file extensions or MIME types
filters.escapeDoubleQuote: Escapes double quotes in a string by adding backslashes (" becomes \")
filters.backslashNToBr:
Converts newline characters (\n) to HTML line break tags (
